title: Outdated Jetty Web Server
description: The target is running Jetty 8.1.7.v20120910 on port 8080. This version is significantly outdated (from 2012) and may contain multiple known vulnerabilities.
evidence:
nmap -sV scan result: 8080/tcp open http Jetty(8.1.7.v20120910)
http-server-header: Jetty(8.1.7.v20120910)
remediation: Upgrade Jetty to the latest stable version (11.x or 12.x). Review and apply security hardening guidelines.
